Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPSKT ;; DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform Socket Methods ; 05/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****;October 1, 2015 ;Per VHA directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. Q ; ; ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ; Methods for Read from/to TCP/IP Socket ; ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ READ(DVPROOT,DVPREAD,DVPTO,DVPFIRST,DVPSTOP,DVPDATA,DVPHDLR) ; N X,EOT,OUT,STR,LINE,PIECES,DONE,TOFLAG,DVPCNT,DVPLEN,DVPBH,DVPEH,BS,ES,DVPOK,DVPX ; S STR="",EOT=$C(4),DONE=0,LINE=0,DVPOK=1 ; ; -- READ tcp stream to global buffer | main calling tag NXTCALL^DVPVLL F R DVPX#DVPREAD:DVPTO S TOFLAG=$T D:DVPFIRST CHK D:'DVPSTOP!('DONE) Q:DONE . ; . ; -- if length of (new intake + current) is too large for buffer then store current . I $L(STR)+$L(DVPX)>400 D ADD(STR) S STR="" . S STR=STR_DVPX . ; . ; -- add node at each line-feed character . ; COMMENTED OUT: Not needed anymore, and has side effect of stripping out line feeds in input . ; array-type parameter values (in XML mode) . ;F Q:STR'[$C(10) D ADD($P(STR,$C(10))) S STR=$P(STR,$C(10),2,999) . ; . ; -- if end-of-text marker found then wrap up and quit . I STR[EOT S STR=$P(STR,EOT) D ADD(STR) S DONE=1 Q . ; . ; -- M XML parser cannot handle an element name split across nodes . S PIECES=$L(STR,">") . I PIECES>1 D ADD($P(STR,">",1,PIECES-1)_">") S STR=$P(STR,">",PIECES,999) ; Q DVPOK ; ADD(TXT) ; -- add new intake line S LINE=LINE+1 S @DVPROOT@(LINE)=TXT Q ; CHK ; -- check if first read and change timeout and chars to read S DVPFIRST=0 ; ; -- abort if time out occurred and nothing was read I 'TOFLAG,$G(DVPX)="" S DVPSTOP=1,DONE=1,DVPOK=0 Q ; ; -- intercept for transport sinks I $E(DVPX)'="<" Q ; ; -- set up for subsequent reads S DVPREAD=200,DVPTO=1 Q ; ; ; ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ; Methods for Opening and Closing Socket ; ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ OPEN(DVPPARMS) ; -- Open tcp/ip socket N I,POP S POP=1 ; ; -- set up os var D OS ; ; -- preserve client io D SAVDEV^%ZISUTL("DVP CLIENT") ; F I=1:1:DVPPARMS("RETRIES") D CALL^%ZISTCP(DVPPARMS("ADDRESS"),DVPPARMS("PORT")) Q:'POP ; -- device open I 'POP U IO Q 1 ; -- device not open Q 0 ; CLOSE(DVPPARMS) ; -- close tcp/ip socket ; -- tell server to Stop() connection if close message is needed to close ;I $G(DVPPARMS("CLOSE MESSAGE"))]"" D ;. D PRE ;. D WRITE($$XMLHDR^XOBVLIB()_XOBPARMS("CLOSE MESSAGE")) ;. D POST ; D FINAL D CLOSE^%ZISTCP D USE^%ZISUTL("DVP CLIENT") D RMDEV^%ZISUTL("DVP CLIENT") Q ; INIT ; -- set up variables needed in tcp/ip processing K DVPNULL ; ; -- setup os var D OS ; ; -- set RPC Broker os variable (so $$BROKER^XWBLIB returns true) S XWBOS=DVPOS ; ; -- setup null device called "NULL" S %ZIS="0H",IOP="NULL" D ^%ZIS I 'POP D . S DVPNULL=IO . D SAVDEV^%ZISUTL("DVPNULL") Q ; OS ; -- os var S DVPOS=$S(^%ZOSF("OS")["OpenM":"OpenM",^("OS")["DSM":"DSM",^("OS")["UNIX":"UNIX",^("OS")["MSM":"MSM",1:"") Q ; SYSOS(XOBOS) ; -- get system operating system QUIT $SELECT(DVPOS["OpenM":$$OS^%ZOSV(),DVPOS["DSM":"VMS",1:"Unknown") ; Q ; FINAL ; -- kill variables used in tcp/ip processing ; ; -- close null device I $D(DVPNULL) D . D USE^%ZISUTL("DVPNULL") . D CLOSE^%ZISUTL("DVPNULL") . K DVPNULL ; K DVPOS,XWBOS ; Q ; ; ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ; Methods for Writing to TCP/IP Socket ; ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ PRE ; -- prepare socket for writing S $X=0 Q ; WRITE(STR) ; -- Write a data string to socket D OS I DVPOS="MSM" W STR Q ; ; -- handle a short string I $L(STR)<511 D:($X+$L(STR))>511 FLUSH W STR Q ; ; -- handle a long string D FLUSH F Q:'$L(STR) W $E(STR,1,511) D FLUSH S STR=$E(STR,512,99999) ; Q ; POST ; -- send eot and flush socket buffer ;D WRITE($C(4)) D FLUSH Q ; FLUSH ; flush buffer I DVPOS="OpenM" W ! Q I DVPOS="DSM" W:$X>0 ! Q ;IF DVPOS="GTM" WRITE # QUIT Q
